pi_items.source: Drupal Commerce configuration entity; verified in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py; confirmed via official Drupal Commerce documentation

Verified from verifier.py lines 63-75 which checks allow_guest_checkout must be false/0 for full score; confirmed in task description 'Goal state: Guest checkout is disabled'; supported by Drupal Commerce login pane documentation

Verified from verifier.py lines 77-88 which checks allow_registration must be true/1 for full score; confirmed in task description 'Goal state: Registration is enabled'; supported by Drupal Commerce login pane documentation

privileged_info_summary: This task configures the Drupal Commerce default checkout flow to enforce user registration. The configuration entity is 'commerce_checkout_flow.default'. The goal state requires the Login pane's allow_guest_checkout setting to be disabled (false) and allow_registration setting to be enabled (true). The task uses a real Drupal Commerce installation with seeded sample data (products, promotions, customer accounts). The verifier checks three criteria: guest checkout disabled (50 pts), registration enabled (30 pts), and login pane active (20 pts), requiring all 100 points to pass.
